items.name: GondorGates
items.description: GondorGates is a horizontally scalable API rate limiting gateway built with Spring WebFlux and Redis. It sits in front of your backend services and enforces configurable traffic limits per endpoint, per dimension (global, per-user, per-IP, per-API key), atomically and without a single distributed lock.
